properties.name: app.frontend-url
properties.description: Frontend base URL used for links and callbacks.

properties.name: app.upload.root-dir
properties.description: Filesystem root directory for uploaded files.

properties.name: app.upload.max-image-size-bytes
properties.description: Deprecated alias for maximum allowed image upload size in bytes.

properties.name: app.upload.max-image-bytes
properties.description: Maximum allowed image upload size in bytes.

properties.name: app.upload.max-receipt-size-bytes
properties.description: Maximum allowed payment receipt upload size in bytes.

properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-seconds
properties.description: JWT token expiration in seconds.

properties.name: app.auth.reset-rate-limit-seconds
properties.description: Rate limit window in seconds for password reset requests.

properties.name: app.auth.reset-token-cleanup-ms
properties.description: Cleanup interval in milliseconds for expired password reset tokens.

properties.name: app.booking.payment-hold-minutes
properties.description: Minutes a booking remains pending before expiration checks.

properties.name: app.booking.expiration-cron-ms
properties.description: Fixed-delay interval in milliseconds for booking expiration job.

properties.name: app.payments.payment-window-hours
properties.description: Allowed payment window in hours after booking.

properties.name: app.payments.paystack.base-url
properties.description: Paystack API base URL.

properties.name: app.payments.paystack.secret-key
properties.description: Paystack API secret key.

properties.name: app.payments.paystack.callback-url
properties.description: Paystack callback URL after payment.

properties.name: app.payments.paystack.webhook-secret
properties.description: Paystack webhook signing secret.

properties.name: app.admin.default-email
properties.description: Default administrator email used for bootstrap login.

properties.name: app.admin.password-hash
properties.description: Default administrator password hash.

properties.name: app.password-reset.expiry-minutes
properties.description: Password reset token validity in minutes.

properties.name: app.password-reset.rate-limit-per-email-per-hour
properties.description: Max password reset requests allowed per email per hour.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Allowed CORS origins.
